title: Artifact
description: - A physical object that is made or modified by human culture

definitions.definition:
- A physical object that is made or modified by human culture
- a three-dimensional object held in an archives
- a library or archival resource that has value as a physical object in addition to its informational value
- an anomaly in data that results from the methodology used to capture or analyze the data, or that was introduced or produced during a procedure
definitions.notes: from NIST: A piece of evidence, such as text or a reference to a resource, that is submitted to support a response to a question.
definitions.sources:
- [https://dictionary.archivists.org/](https://dictionary.archivists.org/)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
